name: latex-snippets
description: Runnable showcase of the latextemplates LaTeX snippets — a modern complement to The LaTeX Companion.

scripts.build: npm run build:snippets && docusaurus build --out-dir build-site

comment:snippets: The snippet build pipeline (build:snippets) needs only ejs + Docker; it resolves yeoman-test from the generator checkout. The rest are Docusaurus deps.
